canonical_answer: At 0s, a handmade book lies flat on a floral surface; at 4s, hands enter holding a red object over open pages; at 6s, the person ties a red ribbon around the book center; at 14s, hands open the book to reveal a pop-up element; at 16s, a card displaying Happy Birthday text is shown.
